description_long: This is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a matte black metal slide and barrel, paired with a dark brown, textured grip. The grip features a star emblem and a checkered pattern for enhanced handling, while the trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The slide has visible serrations for improved grip during operation, and there are engraved markings on the side, including a serial number and other identifiers. The barrel is short and unthreaded, with a clean, smooth finish and a visible muzzle opening. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile. Overall, the handgun exhibits a classic, utilitarian design suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian self-defense scenarios.
description: A compact, black semi-automatic handgun with a brown textured grip, engraved slide markings, and a flat magazine base. The design is classic and functional, with visible details for grip and operation.
description_view_0: The rear view highlights the hammer, rear sight, and the top of the grip with its star emblem and checkered texture.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the slide serrations, engraved markings, trigger, trigger guard, and the full profile of the brown grip.
description_view_2: The front view focuses on the muzzle opening, front sight, and the rounded barrel profile.
description_view_3: The right side view displays additional slide markings, the ejection port, and the detailed grip texture with the star emblem.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is dark brown with a checkered texture for enhanced traction and control. It features a prominent star emblem embedded near the base, and the surface appears to be made of either wood or a high-quality polymer. The grip is contoured to fit the hand comfortably, with subtle ergonomic shaping but no pronounced finger grooves. The checkering covers most of the grip area, providing a secure hold, and the overall design is classic and understated.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, untextured finish and a gentle curve that blends seamlessly into the frame. There are no undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories visible, giving it a traditional and functional appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and unthreaded, with a smooth, rounded profile and no visible compensators or suppressor threads. The muzzle is clean and circular, and the exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide. There are no fluting or external modifications, and the barrel appears robust and utilitarian.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved markings on both sides. On the left, there are serial numbers and possibly a model designation, rendered in a simple, sans-serif font. The right side also displays similar markings, with the text clearly visible and slightly recessed into the metal. No decorative patterns or manufacturer logos are prominently visible, emphasizing a utilitarian style.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and compact profile. There are no extensions, flares, or finger rests, and the base appears to be made of the same material as the grip. The design is simple and functional, with no visible logos or additional texturing.
